# Standard Variant Mapping — Current Exceptions

**Last generated:** 2026-06-21 (full census against a captured `/cards` export — 8,353 records, every record carrying `variant_of_uuid`; not yet generated by an automated ingestion run — see `SWU_Backlog.md` BL-29/BL-33). Supersedes the 2026-06-20 manual spot-check, which sampled too few cards and found only 1 of these 15.

A card appears here if and only if: it is a root in swuapi's variant graph (`variant_of_uuid: null`) but its own `variant_type` is not `"Standard"`. See [`SWU_Standard_Variant_Mapping_Spec.md`](SWU_Standard_Variant_Mapping_Spec.md) §6 for the full definition and philosophy — exceptions are flagged, not blocked from catalog inclusion, and are expected to resolve as swuapi reveals more data.

## Current exceptions (15)

| Set | Card # | Name | Subtitle | Variant Type | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|----------|---------------|-------|
| C25 | 2 | BB-8 | Happy Beeps | Convention Exclusive | Cross-set name match to JTL_145 (Standard) — likely an unpopulated `variant_of_uuid` link, not a true orphan. |
| C25 | 3 | R2-D2 | Artooooooooo! | Convention Exclusive | Cross-set name match to JTL_245 (Standard) — likely an unpopulated link. |
| C26 | 3 | Zam Wesell | Not What She Seems | Convention Exclusive | **Only true orphan** — no Standard match anywhere in the corpus. C26 itself is an in-development preview set (no release date, 6 total cards). Likely previews a printing not yet revealed anywhere. |
| GG | 1 | Dagobah Swamp | — | Hyperspace Foil | Cross-set match to SOR_21 — likely an unpopulated link. |
| GG | 2 | Echo Base | — | Hyperspace Foil | Cross-set match to SOR_24 — likely an unpopulated link. |
| GG | 3 | Catacombs of Cadera | — | Hyperspace Foil | Cross-set match to SOR_26 — likely an unpopulated link. |
| GG | 4 | Jabba's Palace | — | Hyperspace Foil | Cross-set match to SHD_26 — likely an unpopulated link. |
| GG | 5 | Experience | — | Hyperspace Foil | Matches 7 different Standard roots (JTL/LAW/LOF/SEC/SHD/SOR/TS26) — generic token, duplicate-per-set (redesign spec §3.4), not a single resolvable anchor. |
| J25 | 4 | Luke Skywalker | You Still With Me? | Judge Program | Cross-set match to JTL_94 — likely an unpopulated link. |
| J25 | 6 | Darth Vader | Scourge of Squadrons | Judge Program | Cross-set match to JTL_142 — likely an unpopulated link. |
| JTLP | 10 | BB-8 | Happy Beeps | Weekly Play | Cross-set match to JTL_145 — likely an unpopulated link. Also the head of a 2-hop chain (a Weekly Play Foil sibling points to this card, not directly to JTL_145) — see mapping spec §3 chain-walk note. |
| JTLP | 16 | Anakin Skywalker | I'll Try Spinning | Weekly Play | Cross-set match to JTL_197 — likely an unpopulated link; also a 2-hop chain head. |
| JTLP | 4 | Cassian Andor | Threading the Eye | Weekly Play | Cross-set match to JTL_48 — likely an unpopulated link; also a 2-hop chain head. |
| LOFP | 4 | Gungi | Finding Himself | Weekly Play | Cross-set match to LOF_93 — likely an unpopulated link; also a 2-hop chain head. |
| MV26 | 1 | Grogu | Charming Companion | Movie Promo | Cross-set match to ASH_18 — likely an unpopulated link. |

Full diagnostic detail (cross-set match candidates per card) recorded in `swuapi_standard_variant_exceptions_review_2026-06-21.md`.
